LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT LEE LISKEY'S MOTION TO VACATE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. THE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT ARE VOID. FURTHER, THE WEIGHT OF THE EVIDENCE SHOWS THAT THE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT WERE OBTAINED BY EXTRINSIC FRAUD AND/OR MISTAKE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF SEYMOUR GLOGER'S MOTION FOR ASSIGNMENT OF RIGHTS, RESTRAINING ORDER AND TURNOVER ORDER IS GRANTED IN ITS ENTIRETY. THE COURT WANTS THE RECORD TO REFLECT THAT THE COURT STRONGLY SUGGEST THAT THE JUDGMENT/CREDITOR THROUGH COUNSEL ENTER INTO A DISCUSSION WITH THE JUDGMENT/DEBTOR AND HIS COUNSEL BECAUSE THIS MAY END UP BEING THE SUREST WAY TO SATISFY THIS DEBT OVER SOME PERIOD OF TIME. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-18-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: mark zanobini, esq., law office of zanobini, 415.392.8400, for plaintiffs darci sacchetti and seymour glover.
steven taxman, esq., law office of steven taxman, 707.758.2030, for defendant lee liskey m.d.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT LEE LISKEY'S Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment is granted. The default and default judgment are void. Further, the weight of the evidence shows that the default and default judgment were obtained by extrinsic fraud and/or mistake. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.

Off Calendar Aug-10-2012 Granted Per Written Order

APPEARANCES - ATTY. RYAN KRAFT, TEL. NO. (510) 225-9336 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. STEVEN TAXMAN, TEL. NO. (707) 758-2030 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF SEYMOUR GLOGER'S Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order is Granted in its entirety. The court wants the record to reflect that the court strongly suggest that the judgment/creditor through counsel enter into a discussion with the judgment/debtor and his counsel because this may end up being the surest way to satisfy this debt over some period of time. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976 =302/EG

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-30-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-05-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Mark J. Zanobini, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Seymour Gloger, who was not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Lee Roy Liskey, M.D.
Default was entered against defendant on January 13, 2010.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Liskey Medical Group was filed on February 18, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, August 5, 2010.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed today, August 5, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Seymour Gloger, and against the Defaulted Defendant Lee Roy Liskey, M.D. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $250,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - $580.00, for a total of judgment in the amount of $250,580.00.
